items.how_used: 论文在摘要和正文中明确提到经过36小时的计算和分析，体现了竞赛时间管理。
items.source_excerpt: After 36 hours of intense computation and analyzation of your situation, our team has discovered a solution...

items.how_used: 论文假设了最恶劣天气条件和高速公路交通一致性，以确定仓库覆盖范围。
items.source_excerpt: Some assumptions had to be made, particularly regarding seasonal weather conditions as well as traffic consistencies in the highway system. The time of the worst weather conditions was chosen, but that assumes no extraordinary events could slow down distribution.

items.how_used: 论文构建了评分公式 S_R = P_O / (P_I * T) 来评估每个仓库的效率，考虑了外部人口、内部人口和销售税。

variables.T: 仓库所在州的销售税率

items.source_excerpt: The ratio used was S = P / (P T) which counted for the different variables...

items.how_used: 论文使用UPS地面运输时间地图和交互式网站计算人口，并可能绘制了仓库覆盖区域图。
items.source_excerpt: An interactive website was used to calculate the areas in a state and out of a state by creating the similar borders as the map of warehouse areas contained.

items.how_used: 论文通过改变仓库位置（替换评分最低的7个仓库）来测试模型对税收的敏感性。
items.source_excerpt: the warehouses with a score below the first quartile was found inefficient and was then attempted to be replaced with an another location.

items.how_used: 论文在摘要和引言中清晰陈述了问题背景、目标和主要方法。
items.source_excerpt: Online shipping is a major booming business... the team’s goal was to determine the minimum amount of warehouses needed to provide efficient one‑day coverage throughout the Continental United States.

items.how_used: 论文在总结中讨论了模型的优缺点，如可以比较不同仓库的效率，但存在无税或州外人口为零时的缺陷。
items.source_excerpt: The strengths for these models were that you could compare different warehouses and effectively determine efficiency. It also provides an accurate display of the ratios’ correspondence to the sales tax. Some weaknesses include its inaccuracy regarding warehouses with no taxes or out of state population.

items.how_used: 论文提出了三个选址准则：一天内覆盖最优区域、位于主要公路交叉口、最小化覆盖重叠。
items.source_excerpt: The criteria the team used to determine where to place a warehouse is: 1) Optimal area covered by zipcode in one day... 2) Warehouse is located in a city with a major intersection of roads and highways 3) Overlap of one‑day shipping capability reduced to a minimum.
